entry.title: Re: Custom Field from Object Position to Succession Org C...
entry.content: Hi Sam,

entry.title: What is the CI_EKKODB in SAP?
entry.content:
Hi,

What is the CI_EKKODB in SAP?

entry.title: Re: Custom Field from Object Position to Succession Org C...
entry.content: Hi Sam, Thanks for your response. This KBA guides on synching UDF fields to Position. We want to map custom field from Position object to Succession Module and all 15 custom fields of EP have already been used. Kindly assist for this scenario, if it is possible to meet this requirement.

entry.title: Material XXXX status obsolete does not allow the planning run
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have run the MRP LIVE for one of our plant, there are some materials who got failed for planning. Upon checking we found out that these materials are marked with obsolete status. I just wanted to ensured will there be any impact if these materials are not plan or there is any way we can exclude the obsolete materials from planning run. This is very urgent and any help will be appreciated.

Thanks,

Shubham

entry.title: Re: Shift timing error - Shift finish 02:00:00 is after s...
entry.content: Thanks Arjuna, understood the issue.I have to configure as per your suggestion or have to make B2 as my last shift.

entry.title: Re: SAP Convergent Charging - Upgrade from 5.0.6.X to 202X
entry.content:
Hello,

usually the version of each BRIM component should be the same (ex 2023 FPS1) . This is the best way to insure stability of the platform. 

Best regards,

Eric F.

entry.title: Creating multiple PM Malfunction Reports at once
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a question regarding create PM Malfunction Report:

Is it possible to create multiple PM Malfunction Reports at the same time with the same data, but with different equipment? And, how would that work?

Thanks a lot for your help!

Nicole

entry.title: Re: Journal Entry Verification Workflow - Multi Level Flexible Workflow
entry.content: Hi Saleem, Could you please help me on the same to implement multi-level approvals.

entry.title: Custom Pre-Condition for Workflow Parked Invoice as Complete
entry.content:
I have a request to add a Cost Center option in the Workflow for Parked Invoice as Complete pre-condition, start condition section.

I have created a new pre-condition with the name BAdI: Cost Center with custom logic in SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_DEF.

but the option for BAdI: Cost Center does not yet exist and I read that it requires custom logic again with SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVAL

I want to display something like a pop-up window (search help) like that

so that users can immediately choose. Can it be done like that? Thank You

entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors App in the Microsoft Teams App Store and Deprecation of Legacy App Packag
entry.content: Thanks @VanessaLi for the clarification. We went out and explained to our managers that time off approvals they were seeing come through were a new feature and time off requests were coming later on, but then around a week ago they disappeared again! Do you know why? It’s really confusing our comms messages. Thanks

entry.title: Re: How can I access the parameters of objects?
entry.content:
Hello @raymond_giuseppi 



I'm looking for which objects the IDs here are linked to.Does SAP keep such a database?


For example ; This is how I can find out that the 'VL' ID is used on the VL33N screen. But when I operated with the 'VL' parameter in the program (SE38), I also saw that this was not true 🙂 I learned from experienced people that the parameter that should be used here on the VL33N screen is "VLM" (thanks sap community :)) and the program worked properly, but this was always the case. I may not be so lucky.
Therefore, is there a table showing the parameters connected to the screens? I'm looking for this.

  


thanks .

entry.title: Re: Creation of a simple Turnover Analysis with Stories in People Analytics
entry.content:
Hello, 
thanks for this - it has worked great in one of my reports. 
Just one question: is there a way to adapt this report so that I can select a certain time frame for the Turnover Rate calculation? For example if I need the report for March '23 (HC one year back) to Feb '24 (Headcount "Today") with all exits considered in this time frame.... 
Thanks, 
Jan

entry.title: Does SPL screen contact logic?
entry.content:
I couldn't find the information.

We have set the contact linked with the BP, does the screen logic same as customer/vendor?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Material XXXX status obsolete does not allow the plan...
entry.content:
Hello,

Can you set MRP Type as ND in MRP view tab ? I believe if this material set as ND it will not include in mrp run

entry.title: Re: Getting the error message while adding the data hub r...
entry.content:
Hello,

I had similar issue, and fixed it. You must compare your extensions name with the folders in /hybris/bin/modules. it must be matched. If you have any other zip files such as hybris suite integration package,  the missing folders might come from it.

entry.title: Security Updates on "3034848 - List of VAT payers in Poland: (...)"
entry.content:
Hi,

We followed the steps described on sapnote "3291289 - List of VAT Payers for SAP S/4HANA (OVS): Implementation overview" up to the point of deploying the application from github "https://github.com/SAP-samples/localization-toolkit-s4hana-cloud-bank-account-validation."  on our Cloud Foundry

Our Integration team then became concerned that there's no security/authorization features in the application, which would allow anyone with the url from our java application to access the API and make calls.

Should we expect to have such improvements pushed to the official github of this application or such features are something to be customized by ourselves?

entry.title: Re: What is the next product of SAP BusinessObjects Busin...
entry.content:
Hi Idanon,

Next version, SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025, planned for end of 2024, will be available both on premise and as private cloud, and will be supported until at least end of 2031.

Please refer to SAP Analytics Business Intelligence Statement of Direction which remains the reference for SAP BusinessObjects long term strategy and regularly updated.

To you second question, yes, Java APIs will remain available.

Best,

entry.title: Re: Can I extend a certain app? With Clean Core? How?
entry.content:
Hello @snavajan 

It's always ok to ask a question 😊. I mentioned yours very briefly under Part 3 and step 1:

 

@mlauber wrote:

If you need your own custom table, consider if using Custom Business Objects works for your case. If not, be sure to build the RAP object properly (Database table, Basic interface view, View entity, View projection, Behavior, Behavior projection). Remember that custom business objects can have automatic Change Document handling, as well as System Administrative Data (created at, by, changed at, by) handling out-of-the-box.

Once again, there is no "one answer". My personal opinion is that if your custom development is tightly coupled to your S/4HANA system, data or process, and there is no other strong reason for side-by-side (such as using intelligent services from BTP), then I would keep your custom development on-stack. So no, it's wrong to say that any custom development should be side-by-side. Also consider the below recommendation:

You see, for 1 option in the old model you now have several options. Pick the one that suits the development, its business context and business process the best. Remember that custom development should not make things more complex, but should fulfill business requirements to better support the business and end users. Remember you develop for them.

entry.title: Re: What is the next product of SAP BusinessObjects Busin...
entry.content: Thank you very much~~

entry.title: Post-quantum computing threats are game-changing
entry.content:
Are quantum computers a real threat to cryptography and information security? How safe your data and applications are against quantum computers? It takes many years for a conventional computer to crack an RSA 2048 prime number factor encryption, but a powerful quantum computer can crack it in a few hours. How can you protect your data and applications if this becomes a reality?

Join SAP Cybersecurity professional Sandip Dholakia and find out if quantum computers are a real threat to cryptography and how to prepare your data and applications for post-quantum cryptography. 

Speakers: Sandip Dholakia, Principal Security Architect, SAP

Join live and replay: https://youtube.com/live/GPcjJUgJLMg?feature=share

entry.title: Re: Link abapGit repository issue: "SSL handshake with github.com:443 failed"
entry.content: Thank you! It's working now.

entry.title: Bienvenido al SAP CLOUD ALM, session in spanish
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM, es una herramienta que está incluida en su suscripción a la nube y en SAP Enterprise Support, esta herramienta le ayuda a implementar y operar soluciones empresariales inteligentes en la nube e híbridas. En esta sesión, descubra cómo puede beneficiarse de una solución nativa en la nube lista para usar, diseñada como punto de entrada central para gestionar su entorno SAP con una implementación guiada basada en contenido y operaciones altamente automatizadas y que además permite una Grand automatización de tareas del día a día.

Speaker: Cesar Martins, Solution Manager, SAP

Link to join and replay: Bienvenido al SAP CLOUD ALM (youtube.com)

entry.title: Bem-vindo(a) ao SAP Cloud ALM, session in portuguese
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM, que está incluído em sua assinatura na nuvem e no SAP Enterprise Support, ajuda você a implementar e operar soluções empresariais híbridas e inteligentes na nuvem. Nesta sessão, você irá aprender como se beneficiar de uma solução em nuvem nativa e pronta para uso, projetada como ponto de entrada central para gerenciar sua estrutura SAP com uma implementação guiada por conteúdo próprio, e uma operação altamente automatizada.

Speaker: Cesar Martins, Solution Manager, SAP

Link to join and replay: Bem-vindo(a) ao SAP Cloud ALM (youtube.com)

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM - Transports for SAP on-premise Landscape
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking to understand if SAP Cloud ALM provides capabilities for transport management on-premise. I saw there was some information online about the upcoming features for SAP Cloud ALM to not only manage cloud transportation but also on-premise transports.
Could you please help me clarify if regular SAP ABAP on-premise transports are support, if not, whether this functionality will be enabled in the near future?

Thank you


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM - Transports for SAP on-premise Landscape
entry.content: SAP Cloud ALM does support on-premise systems for transport request deployment in the landscape. The SAP Help Portal SAP Cloud ALM documentation contains all relevant prerequisite, setup, and usage information in the Enabling Transport Management - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and On-Premise Systems page.

entry.title: SU01 account type
entry.content:
Dear Expert:

About su01 field "User Type", I confuse how to use.

For my current issue , other SAP system use (ALE and RFC) to communication . If I set User Type:Communication  , it will face "Password logon not possible (Initial password expired) ".

I can set User Type: System , it work. For my current system use, just ALE & RFC. We wish No need change password , password nerver expired. Which User Type useful for my need ?

~~
Jeff


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SU01 account type
entry.content:
Dear Jeff,

 

please refer to the documentation of user types. You can find it idrectly in SU01 (use the 'F1'-function on the user type field) or at many places at help.sap.com.

For instance for s/4 Hana 2021:

https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/ad77b44570314f6d8c3a8a807273084c/4b04325ec2ad2b5ce10000000a42189c.html?locale=en-US

 

b.rgds, 
Bernhard

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I'm Vittorio and I fall in People looking to switch their careers mid-life. I'm 32 and I lost my job few month ago and I'm struggling to find a new position. I became daddy less one year ago and for this reason I want to improve my skills and catch a new job for a better future for my son.

Sincerely

Vittorio.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi @kduong113 - it's great to have you here in SAP Community! I would highly recommend that you join the Beginner's Corner. You will get great advice there from @David_Chaviano and others. I would also like to direct you to this blog post from David.

Best of luck with your studies!

entry.title: Re: screenshots android disabled in the app
entry.content: I would also want to add to this, we could not record a demo of our product on a phone unless it is used on an iOS device.  We had to show the app takes pictures and uses the barcode scanner, so to demo on a laptop was not feasible, even casting your Android device to a computer did not work because of the security enabled. There is now security benefit if you are able to take screenshots on iOS but not on Android. This could rather be a feature that developers can enable should they have the need for it in their application.

entry.title: Re: Impact of enabling Story Reporting on legacy reporting
entry.content: Thank you so much. That helps with some clarity!

entry.title: new hire improvement - direct loading of new hire tasks-instead of reloading and logging out and in
entry.content:
Hello, currently with ONB 2.0 if the new hire completes the onboarding tasks (provide personal data, additional data step and e-sign documents) then he always has to reload the page or log out and log in again to unlock the next task.

Will this be improved with the 1H 2024 Product Release, meaning that the next task can be activated and processed directly after completing the previous task (without reloading the page)?

SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding

entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors App in the Microsoft Teams App Store and Deprecation of Legacy App Packag
entry.content:
@chrisstokes4 

Good catch, we have released this Time Off Approval by accident and prematurely, we applied an immediate patch to remove it afterwards. Therefore it is now removed.

We will be officially releasing the whole Time Off scenario (submit Time off, approve time off) in the upcoming months. Cannot promise it will be 1H 2024, it may slip into a monthly release, for example June/July.

entry.title: Re: How to import internal table from the file in the Eclipse ADT during debugging
entry.content: Many debug features are not available in ADT yet...

entry.title: Re: How to check Application Logs of Imported Financial P...
entry.content: "0003435259 - How to check Application Logs of Imported Financial Plan Data?" We have viewed the description above. We would like to have historical information about when project budget planning data was uploaded. 1.File name 2. Name of the person who uploaded it In the above explanation (0003435259), "Currently this Application Logs doesn't capture the file name which is used to import the financial plan data." It seems that the file name cannot be obtained as log information. Are there any standard features?

entry.title: Re: 🇩🇪 Hands-on with the btp CLI and APIs (Frankenthal, DE)
entry.content:
Hi there - please remember this part of the CodeJam description above:

🚨Important: If you wish to attend this CodeJam, you must register on the DSAG page for the BTP Betriebstag event here: https://dsagnet.de/event/btp-betriebstag-1. 

You have to be a member of DSAG to attend the Betriebstag event, and therefore must go through the DSAG registration page.

I will also ask one of the organisers to comment here, if they have anything more to add.

Thanks for asking!

entry.title: Re: How can I access the parameters of objects?
entry.content: @yalcin_meteNo, there's no such option. How people answer in the forum is by debugging the standard code. Add statement break-point on SET PARAMETER or GET PARAMETER to see all dynamic situations.

entry.title: WS00800304 issue - Purchase Contract displayed twice for first approver in My Inbox app
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

please, help me with issue of displaying PC twice in My Inbox app for the first approver.

As you can see from Flexible WF administration app, one is already completed (approved by all approvers) and second is still In Process waiting for first approval: 


When first task was approved, that disappeared but not the 2nd task - this still remains in the first approvers inbox.

What could be the issue? 

Thank you very much for all of your prompt answers.
KR
Veronika Skybova

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano,

My name is Huy, I am From Viet Nam.

I've already worked as an ABAP developer and I am trying to learn more about all these news changes that are happening in SAP ecosystem, especially in SAP ABAP Cloud on BTP.

I really love working with SAP because it helps businesses improve their processes. It's amazing to see how technology can make such a big difference. I want to keep learning and growing in this field to have a great career.

I'm eager to take a free certification attempt because I believe it will help me learn more and become even better at what I do.  I am grateful for this opportunity and excited about the possibilities ahead.

Thank you for considering my application for the free certification attempt.

Thanks and Best Regards,

Huy

entry.title: Re: Problem with a condition appearing twice in the price...
entry.content:
Hello,

Have you use custom access sequence for that condition type? why you are using requirement instead off access sequence ?

entry.title: Re: I dream with a "Parameterized" Task Chain
entry.content: It is not the same, because each object task has its own TASK_LOG_ID, i.e. the Task Chain has its own, and each of the DF inside it has its own ... Then there is the issue of accessing at run time and from a DSP view, .... BUT you've given me something I hadn't thought of and I appreciate it, I'll see if I can leverage it for something. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: How can I access the parameters of objects?
entry.content:
Browsing some SAP tables (DD03L, DYNPSOURCE, CROSS, etc.) or using SE80 / set/get parameters / where-used search you cound only find thant VL and VLM are used by dozens of data-elements, classes, programs and dynpros.

Basically

  • Always look at dynpro/fields definition for default parameter and at  PBO logic (and initializaton of main program/function group) for exceptions.
  • Then Test.

entry.title: Don't miss out! SAP Financials Forum (WENFIT), April 22-24, virtual event | Webinar on Apr 3
entry.content:
Following the great success of the first global SAP Financials Forum (WENFIT) in 2023, we are thrilled to kick-off another event soon! Discover the latest developments in SAP Finance topics over three half days from April 22-24, 2024, choosing the most convenient time slot for your schedule!

Click the following image to see a one-minute video showcasing the upcoming highlights:

Teaser video: Click the image to watch

Take the opportunity to create your individual agenda from the planned content (see preliminary agenda) and benefit from several parallel presentation tracks:   
    • Expert talks: Our 17+ presentations are designed as dedicated training sessions including theoretical introductions, system demonstrations, and Q&A sessions. Explore a wide range of topic areas including Finance & Management Accounting, Cash & Treasury Management, Generative AI, Sustainability, Reporting, and much more.
    • Meet the Expert session: Following the lectures, you have the opportunity to discuss and clarify your specific questions with SAP experts.
    • Customer insights: Through concise presentations, hear about real-life business cases where renowned customers have successfully managed migration projects in SAP S/4HANA Finance.
    • Basic hands-on session: Get access to a real SAP S/4HANA system! After a theoretical introduction by an SAP expert, you will have the opportunity to perform exercises on selected topics in a live SAP system and discuss any questions you may have afterwards. Secure one of the limited available spots!

 

Are you interested in a quick overview of the event?

    • Register for our webinar on April 3, 3.00-3.30 p.m. (CEST) to get a summary of  the key points and also have the opportunity to ask questions directly to the organizers: Registration Link
    • Check out this blog post with pictures from the last event in April 2023.

 

Info at a glance

✏️Virtual, half-day SAP Financials Forum (WENFIT), April 22-24: Registration & Preliminary agenda
✏️Webinar, April 3, 3.00-3.30 p.m. (CEST): Registration link
❓If you have any comments or questions, please reach out to us.

We look forward to welcoming you to the SAP Financials Forum 2024!

entry.title: Authorization as validation on VF04
entry.content:
Dear Guru,

Can we add validation from VF04?

Sample:
User have a object roles Sales Org "ABC" and Shipping Point "1234" and Delivery Order Doc have a LIKP - VKORG = ABC and LIKP - VSTEL = 1234

Scenario:
User want to create Billing in VF04 with a Individual Billing Document or Collective Billing Document or Collective Billing Doc./Online,

My Plan is Program logic read Object Roles first then Read the Delivery Order Doc. If the information from both matches, generate Billing Document when user klik Individual Billing Document or Collective Billing Document or Collective Billing Doc./Online

but if the information from both doesn't match, Billing not generated and error messages appears "No Authorization for this Sales Org and Shipping Point"


Please for the advice

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Will SAP allow EWA reports for DEV systems in the SAP...
entry.content:
Hi Vera

Thank you very much for the SNote.

I tested with 2 Development ABAP systems. ECC6 NW 7.0 and a SolMan 7.2 NW 7.4 system. 

Both EWAs were available in SAP4ME after scheduling it directly from the systems in transaction SDCCN.

Best Regards

Werner

entry.title: DRC e-Cockpit Add a New Button
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
We are working on a DRC project with Public Cloud in Turkey. We want to add FB60 (Create Incoming Invoices) and MIRO (Create Supplier Invoice) buttons to the cockpit screen and make batch input if necessary. Is this possible? Has anyone done this before?

entry.title: Re: User Exit for inbound DEBMAS IDOC
entry.content: Did you consider (for recent versions) a BAdI such as IDOC_DATA_MAPPER ?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Fully-Activated Appliance: Create your SAP S/4HANA system in a fraction of the usual
entry.content:
Hi Gregg, 

if you install the appliance on your own hardware, a CAL subscription license is not needed (the S/4HANA on-prem license will be but you said you have it so that will be OK).
Just open an incident as described in note 2041140 and the colleagues will check it. 

Effort for installing usually is a couple of days, the note has the installation and First Steps guide attached as PDFs.

Best, Joerg

entry.title: Re: MDK calendar view is not working in web
entry.content:
@sk_ramkumar 

Calendar control functionality has been available in MDK since version 23.12.x onwards. I suspect that while deploying the MDK metadata to Cloud Foundry, you selected the Production option, which has not yet been updated for version 23.12.x. We are working updating it soon.

Please follow these steps:

  1. Delete the .project.json file in your MDK project.
  2. Deploy again to Cloud Foundry and select the Preview web runtime option.

The same page definition works for me when deployed to CF, selecting the preview web runtime option.

entry.title: Errores al ejecutar ciclo de subreparto KEU5
entry.content:
Hola a todos!

He ejecutado el ciclo de subreparto en test mediante la KEU5 y me aparecen algunos mensajes de advertencia:

Me gustaría saber, si es normal que aparezcan estos mensajes o si hay que corregir algo antes de continuar.

Gracias!

Saludos.

entry.title: How we can connect Databricks with BOBJ ?
entry.content:
Hi BO experts,

want to know, what is the best way to connect BOBJ with Databricks.

 

Regards,

entry.title: How change the default variant in cat6?
entry.content:
Hello,

When I execute the CAT6 transaction, I would like to set certain parameters as default selections.

For example, when I start the transaction, I want the “test execution” flag to be active by default.

Unfortunately, the SHD0 transaction doesn’t work as expected; the system doesn’t display the window for customizing the initial selection.

Thanks

Regards

entry.title: Why are the sap-icons broken when I use a custom theme?
entry.content:
I have a OpenUI5 project where I want to add a custom theme.

The theme is coming from a npm package, so I included it in package.json like this:

"dependencies": {
    "webui-theme-my_eservice": "^1.12.1"
}

Then I configured the build command from ui5-cli to also build this into the output:

ui5 build --dest=../../webapp --clean-dest --include-dependency=webui-theme-my_eservice

Finally, I apply my custom theme in index.html:

<script id="sap-ui-bootstrap"
    src="https://sdk.openui5.org/resources/sap-ui-core.js"
    data-sap-ui-theme="my_eservice"
    data-sap-ui-theme-roots='{
        "my_eservice" : "./resources"
    }'
    ...>

When I run the build output on a server, the color scheme and component styles of my custom theme are correctly applied. However, it seems that all references to UI5 Icons are broken:

<Button
    icon="sap-icon://visits" />

ends up displaying as

All icons are displayed as outlined rectangles, and the network log in the developer tools shows errors like:

It appears that the fallback mechanism doesn't work, as the application only is looking for the icons in the custom theme. From my understanding, once a resource is not available in the custom theme, it should fallback to the default theme and pick up the resources from there.

When I switch to a default theme, all icons display as they should.
What do I need to get both my custom theme and the icons working?

entry.title: Re: 🇩🇪 Hands-on with the btp CLI and APIs (Frankenthal, DE)
entry.content:
Hello @qmacro 

I have already a member of the AUUG but unable to see the event

entry.title: Re: SAP IQ NLS-The Cold Storage Solution for SAP BW/4HANA
entry.content: Good Read Sir!  Thanks For Sharing.

entry.title: Long-term loans in a Budget Control System
entry.content:
We are looking for a solution that can help us to control Long-term loans in a Budget Control System. Financial accounts for loans are balance accounts. As far as I know, this kind of accounts doesn't use in budget execution, however, I may be wrong. Any way, if we give loans to other clients and want to control it in BCS, how we can do it?

Can we use FMDERIVE for deriving a budget address directly in Earmarked fund documents?

If it helps, we are in S/4HANA and use Spanish Public Sector country specific functions. 

Thank you in advance

Valentyna

entry.title: Re: Configuration for OCI 5.0 and OCI 4.0 in the S/4HANA Cloud Essentials
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for the blog! I'm still a bit confused regarding the Price validation: When choosing Enable Price validation I understand the price of the PR is compared with the price of the catalog item. But in which case is this applicable? There is no way to change the price during requisitioning so I don't see how the 2 can differ.

Kind regards,

Wouter

entry.title: Re: How to create(similar) widgets available in MS Excel...
entry.content: Thanks, we will try it out, thought SAP might have support for these simple widgets.

entry.title: Re: Minimum order value VA01
entry.content:
Hello,

Any feedback is appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I'm Burcu Çınar and I can identify myself in the following categories. 

  • Women
  • I want to direct my career and enrich with SPA my CV

This is a great initiative by SAP, especially for those like me who want to enter a different sector in their career or who want to enrich their CV. I also want to make an impact in this field and learn the latest trending technologies and developments. I am a graduate of international trade and logistics. I can't wait to get certifications for SAP SuccessFactors and apply my learnings and skills to the work I do.

This is truly an amazing initiative by SAP and a great opportunity for me. I'm positively looking forward to hearing back from you.

Regards,

Burcu Çınar

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Melbourne Mar '24
entry.content:
Time to raise a toast to the SAP Dev Community in Melbourne. Let's take the opportunity to catch up as we get well into 2024. No agenda, no requirements, just come along and be involved in the way you would like.

To coincide with the SAP BTP Innovation Day in Melbourne on Thursday 21st March 2024 at 5:30pm at The Bank on Collins

 Ground floor/394 Collins St, Melbourne VIC 3000.

 

When you arrive, you can ask for a booking under "SAP Regulars Table" 😉

I am really looking forward to sharing this informal community get together. Pass the word around!

See you there.

Ben.

entry.title: Dynamic Date Filter Issue in a Story Based on Live Connection Model [SAC]
entry.content:
Hi all, we are trying to create a story using the ACTIVITY_LOG model which is a live model within SAC that is used to show info in the system overview.

Using this model as base, we created a story(2.0), in it we have a table, measures and dimensions from the model were selected and data is displayed, but when the date filter is set using "Date(Range)", no data is visible, were as when a date filter is set using "Date(Member)" data is visible, so is there any limitation in setting a range date filter when the story is based on a liver model. What we wanted was to set the filter for date dynamically to show the previous 30 days of data using the system date as the base.

Any help in this regard would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: SAP BTP Partner Hands-on Excellence Program Workshop for Partners on SAP Datasphere.
entry.content:
A 2-day hands-on workshop to increase your knowledge and expertise with SAP Datasphere. 

We are planning for a hands-on workshop with SAP Datasphere and the idea is to help you get started with SAP Datasphere and how it can help enterprises to connect and collect data through data virtualization, replication, and orchestration from SAP and third-party sources across clouds and with on-premise applications.

In this workshop you can learn from product experts on how to leverage SAP Datasphere and unify your data and analytics in a multi-cloud solution that provides data integration, database access, data modeling, business semantics, and analytics for a data-driven enterprise. Business users can explore data, integrate new information, and share insights within secure, governed virtual "spaces". With in-depth topic overviews and practical exercises, you will gain knowledge and valuable experience in this end-to-end app development.  In addition, you learn about opportunities to collaborate and to run joint business outcomes in dedicated info-sessions about SAPs Partner Business and SAP Discovery Center.

Expand your network and gather insights from your peers working in other companies.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP DM: Use OEE Time Model Elements to calculate and...
entry.content: You should be able to easily interlink them using Production Processes. Br, Manoel

entry.title: Re: Deep Dive: Footprint Calculation in SAP Sustainability Footprint Management

entry.title: Re: SAC passing parameter from input control with single selection
entry.content: Note - there is an influence request for this item here - please vote on it to register interest and to get notified when the feature is added to SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: SAP Review Booklet Designer – Enhancement to Reporting
entry.content:
Review Booklet Designer:

You might have heard about the latest enhancement that SAP is working on, that is extensibility tools which aid to enhance the presentation requirement of Reporting and in this process, they have introduced a new tool Review Booklet Designer.

The Review Booklet Designer is one of the key user extensibility tools. You create your booklet in the test system and trigger the transport to the production system. With the aid of this tool you can create new pages or even copy the exting pages and make changes as required.

A little info about Review Booklet:

Review Booklet App Helps to display, analyze and validate data. They present an aggregated view of business data by combining predefined business pages, which are usually grouped under main areas.

Review booklets represent the next generation of multidimensional analytical applications. They reuse analytical components, content, and features from SAP Analytics Cloud in UI5 and thus create UI consistency between SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP Analytics Cloud. In review booklets, Fiori apps can embed multidimensional insights for a specific area.

 

 

 

Key Features:

App provides the following key features.

  • Create and manage views.
  • Display business data.
  • Global filters and page filters
  • Business pages
  • Colums and rows
  • Side panel
  • Analyze data at various levels of details.
  • Export data to spreadsheets: You can export individual business pages to spreadsheets by choosing Export to Microsoft Excel from the Report Menu ().
  • Navigate to other apps.

 

Review Booklet Designer: How to Create a Review Booklet in the Review Booklet Designer

 

First open - Manage KPIs and Reports app , Navigate to Review Booklet and select the Booklet you want to copy and click on “Copy”. (Note – you can copy only those whose status is Configuration Final or Application Active. )

 

Give you Boolet a Name

 

 

Click on “Open Configuration”, at the topmost corner

 

 

Here, you can see a blank canvas screen, where you can create your pages and report.

 

 

Under General Tab, you can see the information of the Report.  

 

Navigate to Business Pages Tab , here you can decide how to keep the sequence of the report and whether you what the user to see the visibility of the page . For Visibility, you can just tick or untick the Visible column.

 

 

 

Simply Click on any row on Business page ,where you want to add any page group or page , then Go to “Add” and select the option.

 

Give the page a name , a business group and select the page layout as desired from the below options.

 

You can select from the below options, who you want to display your page. Select the Data Provider, the Columns and Rows.

 

 

 

 

In Next Tab, maintain the Variables,

 

When done click on “Save Final” to save the report.

 

 

 

 

 

Go to Application Tab to create a Fiori Tile , you can see how its going to be visible on Fiori Home page and for easy navigation of the Report. After filling all details , click on Save and Publish.

 

On Fiori Home page , in search bar type your booklet name and click on it

 

 

Fill the parameters and select the page you want to analyse

 

 

 

 

 

At the Right most side, you can select page filters and Filter your data

 

 

Further References


SAP Help

SAP Best Practice

 

This post intends to give a round up on SAP Review Booklet Designer and the basic elements.

Thank you for going through the post. Your feedback and comments will help me make it more relevant to the community.

 

Give it a Hands on and explore the capabilities of SAP.

That’s All Folks!

Have a Great Day 😊

entry.title: Activating duplicate check in convergent invoicing
entry.content:
Activating duplicate check in convergent invoicing

There can be instances where bits can be sent again with same information due to issues in source system/interface. When such bits are received they get billed and invoiced automatically based on the setup.

Revering such duplicate data i.e., invoice, billing document and excepting bits is cumbersome activity.

To avoid such scenarios, activating duplicate check will restrict processing of duplicate bits further i.e. billing and invoicing.

Duplicate check configuration

Step1 : Define schema for duplicate check 

FICAIMG > convergent invoicing  > Basic Functions > Billable items > billable item management >Define schema for duplicate check 

Define duplicate check schema, name.

In processing rule if 3 Except Duplicates(Status Raw Excepted)is selected then the duplicated bits will be processed under status Raw Excepted  with the exception reason selected below.

In function module we can add Z functionality , if any additional  conditions to be added.

Check period to be added to validate new bits with previously created bits by number of days

 

Step2: Add fields for duplicate check

Based on the fields added system identifies the duplicate using the combination

 

Step 3: Assign schema  for duplicate check

FICAIMG > convergent invoicing  > Basic Functions > Billable items > billable item management >Assign schema for duplicate check

In this assign the duplicate schema created to billable item class

entry.title: Re: SAC passing parameter from input control with single selection
entry.content: Note - there is an influence request for this item here - please vote on it to register interest and to get notified when the feature is added to SAP Analytics Cloud.

entry.title: Re: SQL query to calculate delivery dates for the Frame Agreements (Sale Blanket Agreement)
entry.content: Your query contains StartDate and EndDate. Which of these dates is the "delivery date"? Could you please post a screenshot of the query result, and a table of with the expected result?

entry.title: Re: Library Copy Feature
entry.content:
Hi SravanthiVedula

Not aware of any feature which allowed a library to be copied within LMS. This just didn't exist.

You could always raise this an enhancement request in the Customer community portal and with business reasons, our Engineering team would look into this request based on the Kudos that it garners along with the reason of the request and they might implement. This usually takes time. Check KBA 2090228 that explains this.
 
An option which you could consider would be to firstly create a new library. Then use the Item Connector to associate any number of Items to the library you have just created.

If this information helped you then please consider giving Kudos or accepting this post as solution.

Padraig

SAP Build Apps


@EsmeeX @MaiaraEllwanger @liardo

This is regarding SAP Analytics cloud excel Addin.

Please note i'm able to change and process the existing data but facing the issue for any new data.

Thanks,

Lakshmi

entry.title: Automatic packing of EWM Outbound delivery based on Packing Instructions (UPB)
entry.content:
Automatic packing in EWM Outbound delivery was always required and so from version 2022, SAP came up with concept of UPB where in it was made possible to pack the outbound deliveries automatically by using Packing Instructions/Specification within the transaction.

As per the existing design the packing in outbound delivery is done manually, in which the user will select the picked item that needs to be packed and create a handling unit to pack the subsequent item. Drag and drop of product to pack it in the created handling unit is also available.

However, it is a tedious job to select every product/item manually and create HU’s to pack them.

To make this process easier for the customers, auto pack functionality is introduced- where the customer can simply choose the product to be packed and click on “Auto pack” button which will identify the appropriate packaging materials of the products and create the handling units automatically.

This article covers for Auto packing based on Packing Instructions instead of pack specification In EWM Outbound Delivery by using Unified Packaging Builder (UPB)

  • Config for UPB 
  • Master data
    • Packing Instructions (POP1) and Packing condition records (POF1)
  • Business Process 
    • Auto Pack based packing instructions for specific product and ship to party/Customer in EWM Outbound delivery

1. Config part

Logistics General => Handling Unit Management =>Automatic Packing => Unified Package Building

Activate UPB

Define Unified Package Building Profile -> Choose Packing Instructions

Maintain Packing Process Profiles

Define Procedure for Packing Instructions Determination

  • Add Condition Type 0OBD 

SPRO -> EWM -> Goods Issue -> Define Document Types for Outbound Delivery Process  

  • Assign UPB profile to Outbound document type  

 

2. Master Data -> For  Auto Packing (Nested) during Outbound after picking 

POP1 – Packing Instructions

Level 1 :

Level 2 :

Packing Instruction -> Warehouse tab ->  Maintain HU type in both the levels.

Packing Conditions records (POF1) ->Customer and Product specific Auto packing.

Enter Determination type -> 0OBD

Key combination -> Choose Material and Ship -to-party

Assign Packing Instructions for Customer and Product Master

3. Business Process : Auto Packing using of packing instruction per Customer and Product Master in EWM Outbound delivery

Pre-requisites are 

  • Picking -> Stock should move to Pack Workstation  or Good issue Zone.
  • Picking Status should confirmed status.

Go to Follow On functions -> Pack

Select  HU 

Control Tab -> Enter BIN

Click Button  -> Pack Automatically Button

System has packed based on packing instructions 23

Conclusion : EWM Outbound delivery is packed automatically based on Customer and Product Master by using packing Instructions (Unified Package Builder)

SAP Note 3301323 - Automatic packing for outbound delivery  -> implemented on  S4HANA 2022 (107)

entry.title: E4H Conversion Error in Phase MAIN_NEWBAS/XPRAS_AIMMRG
entry.content:
If you are trying to do a E4H Conversion from SAP GTS 11.0 to SAP GTS Edition for HANA 2023 with S/4 HANA Foundation 2022 then you may come across below error.

Issue:

During the execution phase below error is reported

Sql command that runs 

INSERT INTO "/SAPSLL/TEDTM" ( "MANDT", "STCCS", "RTYPE", "TLC_AART" ) SELECT DISTINCT

 "/SAPSLL/LC_CUSM"."MANDT", "/SAPSLL/TLEGSU"."CTSIM" as "STCCS", "/SAPSLL/LC_CUSM"."RTYPE",

 "/SAPSLL/LC_CUSM"."TLC_AART" FROM "/SAPSLL/LC_CUSM" INNER JOIN "/SAPSLL/TLEGSU" ON

 "/SAPSLL/LC_CUSM"."MANDT" = "/SAPSLL/TLEGSU"."MANDT" AND "/SAPSLL/LC_CUSM"."LGREG" =

 "/SAPSLL/TLEGSU"."LGREG" WHERE "/SAPSLL/TLEGSU"."LGREG" = "/SAPSLL/LC_CUSM"."LGREG" AND

 "/SAPSLL/TLEGSU"."SRVLL" = 'LECCUS' AND "/SAPSLL/TLEGSU"."CTSTY" = '101' AND NOT (

 "/SAPSLL/LC_CUSM"."MANDT" = '000' )

Solution:

Old table: /SAPSLL/LC_CUSM

New table after conversion: /SAPSLL/TEDTM

The reason for the above error is that there are some duplicate entries that exists in /SAPSLL/TEDTM table so the XPRA report is not able to insert the content into the table and it throws an error.

While you can find similar kind of 301 error for different type of schema and table but there is no specific steps for this table which comes during the conversion.

Option1:

     Try to login to the clients and see if you can get help from functional consultant to identify the duplicate entries from the table and repeat the phase. (Take a backup before you do this)

Option 2: 

Accept the error at this stage and complete the conversion.

Once the conversion is done do below steps.

Check if the index exists.Most likely it will because its a ~0 index and its reserved index which means you can only see that in se14.It wnt even show in hana studio.

- Drop the index from below command from hana studio

ALTER TABLE "SAPABAP1"."/SAPSLL/TEDTM" DROP CONSTRAINT "/SAPSLL/TEDTM~0";

- For HANA databases, use the HANA scripts HANA_Data_DuplicateKeys_CommandGenerator_1.00.100+ and HANA_Data_DuplicateKeys_columnStore_Deletion_CommandGenerator attached in SAP Note 1969700 to remove duplicates

below the command that i used

**************************************

DELETE FROM
"SAPABAP1"."/SAPSLL/TEDTM"
WHERE
"$rowid$" IN
( SELECT
ROW_ID
FROM
( SELECT
"$rowid$" ROW_ID,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "MANDT", "STCCS", "RTYPE") DUP_NO
FROM
"SAPABAP1"."/SAPSLL/TEDTM"
)
WHERE
DUP_NO > 1
)
WITH HINT (NO_AGGR_SIMPLIFICATION, NO_GROUPING_SIMPLIFICATION)

*******************************

@note: Please be double sure when you run this command.Have it verified with the functional consultant as its going to delete duplicate entries from the table.

- Once duplicates are removed, try to create the index again

ALTER TABLE "SAPABAP1"."/SAPSLL/TEDTM" ADD CONSTRAINT "/SAPSLL/TEDTM~0" PRIMARY KEY ( "MANDT", "STCCS", "RTYPE" )

- Run the XPRA again /SAPSLL/XPRA_V8000 (this is the same XPRA which ran during the execution phase)

and this time it should typically work without giving issues.

 

Hope this help.

Thanks

Sid

entry.title: Comparing Workflow Templates in SAP
entry.content:
Introduction

Identifying the changes present between different versions of workflow templates can be a challenge. Unlike other objects, there isn't a built-in functionality for direct comparison. Manually scrutinizing each step of the templates side-by-side can be both tedious and error-prone.

This lack can be frustrating, as I’ve witnessed firsthand through inquiries from few of my colleagues struggling to identify changes between versions for troubleshooting or maintaining consistency across environments. Fortunately, I’ve been able to help them by employing a couple of effective techniques that help bridging this gap.

While there are few solutions available online, I haven’t encountered a comprehensive resource specifically dedicated to guiding users through this process. Therefore, I’m writing this post with the hope of empowering you with effective method for comparing workflow template versions in SAP. Additionally, it serves as a future resource for my colleagues whenever they encounter similar challenges, allowing me to simply direct them to this guide.

Comparing Workflow Templates

Gearing Up:

  • For this post, I’ll be using two workflow templates which are nearly identical, except for a few differences which I have deliberately introduced in order to demonstrate the process.
  • We are going to need a text editor which supports two key functionalities: “Find” feature using regular expressions, as well as has feature to compare two text files (diff tool). I will be using Visual Studio Code for this as it offers both features seamlessly.
  • We will be comparing the two workflow templates by exporting the templates as XML file and comparing the exported files in Visual Studio code. However, there's a catch. By default, these exported files may be compressed and lack proper formatting, making it difficult to see any changes. To address this, we'll need to format the XML files using the "XML Tools" extension within VS Code. This extension transforms the raw XML into a human-readable format, allowing us to easily identify any modifications/differences when comparing the files using the built-in diff tool.

Now that we’ve got our list of tools prepared, let's explore the steps to identify differences in two workflow templates.

Step 1. Export the templates as XML file.

In this step, we will open both templates in Workflow Builder (SWDD) and export the templates as XML file. The menu option to export the files can be found at Menu > Workflow > Import/Export > Export to XML File > Export Workflow as Internal XML

Step 2. Open exported files in Visual Studio Code

In this Step, we will move the two exported files to a separate folder named “Compare” and open this folder in Visual Studio Code. To open the folder in Visual Studio Code, File > Open Folder command can be used from the menu bar.

Step 3. Formatting the XML files

It can be seen that the exported XML files are compressed and do not contain proper indentation. We will need “XML tool” extension to convert these XML files to readable format so that the changes are easily visible when compared.

The “XML tools” extension can be installed in Visual Studio code by following these simple steps:

  • Navigate to View menu.
  • Select Extensions
  • Search for “XML Tools” in the search bar
  • Click the install button.

 

Once the “XML Tools” extension is installed, go back to the XML files, right click on the XML code, and choose Format Document With > XML Tools. Do this for both XML files.

 

After formatting, the files will be transformed into a more readable format, similar to the files in following screenshot.

 

Step 4. Comparing the two files

In this step we will finally compare the differences between two XML files. To compare two files, right click on first file and chose “Select for Compare”, then right click on the second file and choose “Compare with Selected”.

 

The difference checker tool should now open in the main panel of Visual Studio code, and the differences between two files should be highlighted in Red and Green. An overview of all changes present throughout the whole file can also be seen at the right-hand side present in a panel called mini-map (highlighted in below screenshot). This mini-map offers a quick glimpse at all modifications throughout the files and facilitates scrolling when clicked on the highlighted part on minimap.

 

As can be seen in the mini-map every difference present in two XML files is highlighted. However, the changes including workflow IDs, version numbers, and timestamps have also been highlighted. These differences aren't relevant to our goal. These irrelevant differences are creating noise in the difference checker tool, making it harder to identify the actual changes we're interested in. To address this, we'll strategically remove these irrelevant differences from both files, ensuring only the significant modifications remain highlighted.

To eliminate these irrelevant differences, we will leverage the Regular expressions powered “find” feature of Visual studio code.

Let's begin by addressing the discrepancies caused by different workflow IDs within the two XML files. Press Ctrl+F to open find feature, enter the workflow ID in the find box and replace all occurrences of workflow ID with an empty string. Do this for both files.

 

In my case, removing the workflow IDs significantly reduced irrelevant highlights, however, the differences in "Changed Date" and "Changed Time" were still creating noise (highlighted below). To achieve a cleaner comparison, let's eliminate these discrepancies as well.

 

Removing individual <CHANGED_ON>,  <CHANGED_AT> and similar tags would not be efficient due to their multiple occurrences with  different enclosed timestamp within each XML file. Simple find and replace operation would not help because the timestamp enclosed within tags are different in same XML file. Instead, we'll utilize a regular expression to target all such tags effectively.

Here’s how to proceed:

  • In the Find input box, enter the following regular expression: <(CHANGED|ACTIVAT)_(ON|BY|AT)>[^<>]+
  • Enable the “Use Regular Expression” option (highlighted in screenshot below)
  • Replace all matched occurrences with and empty string in both XML files.

 

The above regular expression effectively targets all occurrences of Changed/Activated on/at/by tags and replaces those with empty string.

While much of the noise was removed after performing above step, examining the mini-map revealed additional noise in the form of <VCYPOS>, <VCXPOS>, <LCXPOS>, and <LCYPOS> tags (can be seen in below screenshot). My understanding of these tags is that they represent the X and Y coordinates of object/node positions within the workflow. As we're not interested in these changes, we can eliminate them from both XML files as well.

To achieve this, we will use <(LC|VC)(X|Y)POS>\d+ Regular expression. Enter this regular expression in the “find” box and replace all matched occurrences with empty string in both XML files.

 

 

Finally, with all the irrelevant differences eliminated, the comparison tool now displays only the four key changes within the XML files that we were originally looking for.

 

With the help of highlighted differences, I found the following changes that were made in workflow template:

  1. The template name was changed from ZTICKET1 to ZTICKET2 (Line 6).
  2. The description of the template was changed from “Example workflow for Ticket system (V1)” to “Example workflow for Ticket system (V2)”. This can be noted in line 7.
  3. The Object ID, similar to the workflow template ID, differs between the files. This is expected and is irrelevant to our analysis. We could've removed it during the de-noising process if it had numerous occurrences.
  4. Further down the file (line 1118, as indicated by the mini-map), I encounter another important change.
    This modification suggests that the Expression binding of node 50 has been changed from &_WF_INITIATOR& to &AGENT& which is indeed correct and can be confirmed from below image

 

Conclusion:

By following these steps, I was able to identify the exact changes that were made in the workflow template. This approach streamlined the process and ensured accurate identification of modifications made between different versions/templates of workflow.

I hope this guide has proven informative. Feel free to leave comments below with any questions or suggestions for further improvement.

Thank you for your time!

entry.title: Using an OData API get records back to back in a single page by clicking a button in SAP Build Apps.

I am using an OData API which is carrying around 1000 of records, we are calling first 20 records through pagination in data variable, is there any way to call the rest of the data in a form of 20 records in a repetitive manner on the same page by configuring a button in SAP Build Apps.

Thanks in advance,
Yashmin

@Dan_Wroblewski , @marihirvi , @StephanKoenig , @Ian_Thain , @SandipAgarwalla

entry.title: Interview Scheduling - Server Connection Failed: Exception fetching availability
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm seeking your advice regarding the Interview Scheduling feature in the SuccessFactors Recruiting module. In the screenshot below, the "Find Availability" button appears to be malfunctioning, displaying an error message stating "exception fetching availability." Although I can manually select custom slots, I encounter another error when proceeding to the next page to finalize scheduling, which states "exception occurred while saving interview details."

The Outlook and Microsoft Teams integration has not been enabled; the functionalities mentioned are solely within the Recruiting module. Has anyone else experienced similar issues? Your insights would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Learn How to Create an Incentive Outcome Dashboard in Report Stories
entry.content:
Hello again!
Following some conversations with our customers there was been a requirement where access to Compensation Executive Review, worksheets, etc be made available from directly within the report story. This removes the need of having multiple tabs open as well as you being able to filter and visualise the report data, while also being able to access worksheets or Executive Review.
So, through using the suite deep links we can achieve this through adding a site from within the report. Below is an example:

report sample

To have this added into your report.

Edit the report> Insert> Add> Others> Web Page

Edit the tile which is added to the report and provide a header / title as well as the deep link. For all deep links available in SuccessFactors, click here. 

Hope this helps 🙂

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: how to compare Calculation view field structure betwe...
entry.content:
Hi Naiduz,

 

I don't believe such a mechanism exists for comparing different systems.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/fc5ace7a367c434190a8047881f92ed8/b06adc3dec9a4cbfb4c232d7ff6c4353.html

You can compare old and new versions of the same view as described in this community topic :

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-perform-version-comparison-for-hana-calculation-views/qaq-p/622974

 

Kind Regards

Simon

entry.title: Re: Deep Dive: Footprint Calculation in SAP Sustainability Footprint Management

Some of my colleagues have heard this from unknown source, which is difficult to believe. 

Kr, Debashish.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Is direct SAP HANA database connectivity permitted in...
entry.content:
Hello Vijay,

 

Typical ODBC driver support for S/4 HANA Private Cloud with RISE is supported according to the services guide :
https://assets.cdn.sap.com/agreements/product-policy/hec/roles-responsibilities/rise-with-sap-s4hana-cloud-private-edition-and-sap-erp-tailored-option-english-v3-2022.pdf

Here is the ODBC connection guide :
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/0eec0d68141541d1b07893a39944924e/66a4169b84b2466892e1af9781049836.html

 

I know that S/4 Private HANA Cloud customers have somewhat more access to their HANA DB than S/4 HANA public customers and HANA Cloud etc, but the HANA Enterprise Cloud operations support team(XX-HST-OPR component) would be able to assist where needed for the process if required.

Kind Regards

Simon

entry.title: Re: How do I get columns with no Data to show up in a cro...
entry.content:
I can't believe nobody answered this question at the time. I was looking for just this: "How do I get columns with no data to show up in a crosstab". This must be an issue which lots of people have come across, surely. For example, you might want to show all the products you sell to show in a crosstab, regardless of whether you sold any during the week for which you ran your report. Webi normally doesn't work like this, and it only shows fields with data.

For me being able to do this was particularly important because the data is feeding into a bigger report in Excel, and missing columns cause annoying problems. I found a suggestion elsewhere in the SAP community, but I can't find it again now. I couldn't believe I'd not thought about this, but all it needed was a list of all columns (e.g. a list of all products you sell) in an Excel workbook, and using this as an additional data source. I then merged the dimensions and this solved the issue. 

Just adding this now in case it's of use for anyone else looking for a solution.

entry.title: Re: Using an OData API get records back to back in a sing...
entry.content:
Hi

yes possible. Use Previous, Next button to modify the $top & $skil parameters and call the API accordingly.

entry.title: Re: Create a oData server and add multiple entity
entry.content:
To create a single OData service with all four tables from the SNWD_EPM model, you can utilize associations to link the tables within the service. However, if there's no direct relationship between Set A (SNWD_PD and SNWD_BPA) and Set B (SNWD_SO and SNWD_SO_I), you may need to establish a connection between them through a common field or intermediary table.

Click here to explore various methods for establishing relationships between disparate sets of tables in your OData service.

entry.title: Can I include snapshot key figures in my planning are CPI-DS staging table for upload?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to merge a currency based planning objects using CPI-DS.  The current planning level is Location/Customer/Product/Currency and I currently have multiple currencies per Location/Customer/Products.  I wish to combine these into a single record (the currency may vary between different Location/Customer/Products but there should only be one per combination). 

I am creating a dataflow to pull all the data and load all the converted values to my primary currency planning object and set all the alternate currencies to zero to allow a future deletion.  My issue is that the planning object has some snapshot key figures defined.  I am able to pull the data into CPI-DS for the snapshot figure, but after I am unable to get the snapshot key figures to show in my key figure staging table for exporting back into IBP.  I tried to turn on ENABLE_SNAPSHOT_KFS to see if that exposed the snapshot key figures but it was not a success (I assume this just allows me to manually upload via the Data Integration fiori app).

The question is whether it is possible to output to snapshot key figures directly out of a CPI-DS data flow and if so how,

Thanks,

Jez

entry.title: Re: Multiple billing document creation for zero quantity and Status completion is not feasible in VF
entry.content: From your post, it is not clear what is the issue. You may have to add more information on what is the issue with the related screen shots.

entry.title: Re: 🇩🇪 Hands-on with the btp CLI and APIs (Frankenthal, DE)
entry.content:
Hi @Kaustavsap2 ,

This is not an ASUG event but an DSAG event (German-speaking SAP user group). To see the event, please log in via https://dsagnet.de/login/ and then join the group AG BTP Development & Operations.

Afterwards, you should be able to use the link https://dsagnet.de/event/btp-betriebstag-1 (for this session) and also https://dsagnet.de/event/sap-code-jam-service-integration-with-sap-cloud-application-programming-model-1 (CodeJam on March 21th - more details here).

If you only want to join the CodeJam and not the BTP Operations Day (in German), I would recommend to join the CodeJam on March 21th.
